narrative:
Beaverdam (precinct in Allen County) has 182 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.7 percentage points.
